For Businesses

A merchant-ready delivery network without the cost of building your own fleet

SLYDE is built for retailers, restaurants, pharmacies, marketplaces, and enterprise teams that need reliable delivery support, customer confidence, and a scalable logistics partner.

Start Partnership InquiryView API Positioning

Same-day support

On-demand and same-day delivery operations

Use SLYDE for urgent local dispatch, customer deliveries, and managed fulfillment workflows.

Tracked service

Live delivery visibility and proof of delivery

Customers and operators get greater confidence through status updates, milestone tracking, and delivery confirmation.

No internal fleet required

A scalable delivery layer without fleet build-out

SLYDE reduces the burden of managing your own courier hiring, routing, and dispatch stack.

Integration flexibility

Ready for manual operations now and deeper integrations later

Start with direct partnership workflows and move into API-connected order orchestration as needed.

Partnership Intake

Partnership inquiry

Tell SLYDE what type of operation you run, where you need delivery coverage, and how your delivery volume behaves. Merchant inquiries are reviewed against zone readiness, courier network strength, and launch control.

Secure public intake flow
Ready for backend routing

Merchant legal acknowledgments

SLYDE is onboarding merchants region by region. These acknowledgments are required so your inquiry can move into review, waitlist handling, and future onboarding safely.

After submission, SLYDE may contact your business by email, WhatsApp, or phone regarding waitlist status, onboarding readiness, and launch timing in your area.

Merchant interest submissions are version-linked to SLYDE legal documents so onboarding, waitlist review, and future activation remain auditable.

By submitting this form, your business will also acknowledge the Merchant Interest and Onboarding Terms and the Merchant Privacy Notice.

Structured errands

Safer, more structured errand workflows for real-world tasks

Not every task ends at delivery. Some business and customer requests require in-person purchases, payments, or task completion steps that need stronger operational control. SLYDE is building structured errand workflows with clearer proof requirements, stronger completion records, and support for digital payment-enabled operations where appropriate. This helps reduce confusion around reimbursements, payment handling, and task verification.

Better proof and accountability

Receipt-backed and confirmation-backed workflows help create clearer records for sensitive errand jobs.

Reduced payment ambiguity

Structured operational rules can help reduce misunderstandings around what was paid, what was purchased, and what was completed.

Designed for modern commerce support

As SLYDE evolves, supported digital rails can strengthen the way errands, pickups, and in-person completion tasks are handled within the network.

Talk to SLYDE for your business
For businesses, this means more confidence in how errands are executed. For customers, it means stronger visibility. For Slyders, it means clearer systems and safer workflows.

Business Growth

Move from manual delivery coordination to a structured logistics partner

SLYDE is positioned to help businesses improve fulfillment performance now while preparing for future operational integrations.

Contact SLYDEReview Coverage

Jamaica-First Logistics Infrastructure

SLYDE connects courier capacity, merchant fulfillment, and partner-ready logistics workflows.

Built for local operational credibility now, with standards that can support wider Caribbean scale later.
SLYDELogistics

SLYDE is a modern logistics network for Jamaica first, designed to support courier operations, merchant fulfillment, and future Caribbean partner integrations.
